user.title: RecTeq sign-in
user.description: Enter the email and password you use in the RecTeq app. We'll fetch your grills from the cloud, then talk to them directly over your local network — no further internet round-trips.

pick_device.title: Choose a grill
pick_device.description: Multiple supported RecTeq grills on this account — pick one to add.

manual_ip.title: Enter LAN IP for {device_name}
manual_ip.description: We couldn't auto-discover {device_name} on your local network — usually because Home Assistant is running in a Docker container that doesn't see UDP broadcasts (common on Docker Desktop for Mac/Windows). Enter the grill's local IP from your router. Linux/HAOS installs typically don't see this step.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the RecTeq cloud. Check your internet.
error.api_error: RecTeq API returned an error. Try again in a minute.
error.invalid_host: That doesn't look like a valid IPv4 address.

abort.already_configured: This grill is already set up.
abort.no_supported_devices: No supported RecTeq grills on this account.
